name: task-create-templates-vary-by-issue-type
tags: tasks create, issue_type, template, misc, feature, body format, create gate rejects, task:d89a8445
body: tasks__create's required body sections differ by issue_type, and the create gate error message includes the exact missing section name and a full template to copy — e.g. issue_type=misc requires a "Notes:" section (not "Motivation:", which is the feature template's field). Why: guessing the template from memory of a different issue_type causes an avoidable round-trip. How to apply: on the first create-gate rejection for an issue_type you haven't used yet this session, just copy the template verbatim from the error message rather than guessing again.
